channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Senate Republicans question $1 billion funding request for White House security upgrades
item.description: Senate Republicans are expressing concern over a $1 billion funding request included in a broader immigration enforcement package that would, in part, fund security upgrades for President Donald Trump...

item.title: Government and WHO Launch Nationwide Hepatitis C Screening and Treatment Initiative
item.description: Islamabad: The Ministry of Health in collaboration with the World Health Organisation (WHO) has officially launched the Prime Minister's Hepatitis C Elimination Programme. The initiative aims to elimi...

item.title: Tallulah Bankhead: Iconic Broadway Actress and Unforgettable Personality
item.description: Tallulah Bankhead (1902–1968) was a remarkable American actress celebrated for her commanding stage presence, gravelly voice, and sharp wit. Born into a prominent political family in Alabama, she brok...

item.title: History and Charm of Crocodile Rock in Millport, Scotland
item.description: Crocodile Rock, located on Millport Beach in the Isle of Great Cumbrae, Scotland, is a unique natural rock formation that has been painted to resemble a crocodile for over a century. Formed millions o...

item.title: UK to experience unseasonably warm weather with temperatures above 25°C
item.description: According to weather forecasters, the United Kingdom is set to experience a spell of unseasonably warm temperatures, reaching 25°C and higher in various regions. This unusual warmth, especially for th...

item.title: President Ruto Endorses Justice Njoki Ndung'u for ICC Judge Position
item.description: On 13 May 2026, President William Ruto officially launched Lady Justice Njoki Ndung'u's candidature for a judge position at the International Criminal Court (ICC) at State House Nairobi. The President...

item.title: Authorities Issue Millions of Warnings to Users Searching for Child Sexual Abuse Material
item.description: Authorities have sent over 70 million warnings to internet users who attempted to access content related to child sexual abuse. These warnings are part of ongoing efforts to prevent the distribution o...

item.title: Legal Aid Program Enhances Citizens’ Understanding of Their Rights in Pemba
item.description: In Pemba, a new legal aid project has been rolled out to educate the local communities about their legal rights and responsibilities. The initiative focuses on empowering residents with knowledge that...

item.title: Bijou Barrington: Celebrated 1940s American Fashion Icon
item.description: Bijou Barrington was a prominent American fashion model in the 1940s, renowned for her sophisticated and graceful presence. She frequently appeared in major fashion magazines like Harper’s Bazaar and ...

item.title: Governor Fubara Urges IAUE Graduands to Uphold Discipline and Professionalism at 44th Convocation
item.description: Rivers State Governor, Sir Siminalayi Fubara, don charge graduands of Ignatius Ajuru University of Education (IAUE) for Port Harcourt to always show discipline and professionalism for wherever dem dey...

item.title: Ancelotti Discusses Brazil Squad, Neymar, and World Cup Ambitions
item.description: Carlo Ancelotti, the newly appointed Brazil head coach, spoke in an exclusive interview about his philosophy, goals, and approach to leading the national team ahead of the 2026 World Cup. The 66-year-...

item.title: DOJ Faces Ethics Inquiry Over Withholding Murder Warrant From Federal Judge
item.description: The Trump administration is under scrutiny for allegedly concealing a murder warrant from a federal judge in Rhode Island, Melissa DuBose, in order to secure the release of an immigrant in detention a...

item.title: CBN Removes Oil Companies FX Restriction as Naira Stabilizes
item.description: On March 25, 2026, the Central Bank of Nigeria quietly remove the cash pooling requirement wey international oil companies (IOCs) like Shell, Chevron, ExxonMobil, TotalEnergies, and Eni (Agip) dey fol...

item.title: Vice Admiral Angus Topshee Appointed Vice Chief of Defence Staff
item.description: Vice Admiral Angus Topshee, a senior officer in the Royal Canadian Navy, has been promoted to the position of Vice Chief of Defence Staff. This new role places him second-in-command of the Canadian Ar...

item.title: Reversing Lysosomal Dysfunction Restores Youthful Function in Aged Blood Stem Cells
item.description: Researchers at the Icahn School of Medicine at Mount Sinai have discovered a method to restore youthful function to aged blood-forming stem cells in mice by repairing lysosomal defects. Lysosomes, the...

item.title: A Visual Journey Through Early 1900s Saturday Evening Post Covers
item.description: In the early 20th century, The Saturday Evening Post became one of America's most beloved magazines, recognized for its striking illustrated covers. From 1900 to the 1920s, these covers offered vivid ...

item.title: Analysis finds some shop-bought sandwiches exceed daily recommended salt intake
item.description: A study by Action on Salt & Sugar has revealed that certain sandwiches sold by popular UK bakeries and retailers contain alarmingly high levels of salt. The smoked chicken Caesar club from Gail's, for...

item.title: PCOS Renamed to PMOS to Reflect Multisystem Health Impacts
item.description: Polycystic ovary syndrome (PCOS), affecting over 170 million people worldwide, has been officially renamed polyendocrine metabolic ovarian syndrome (PMOS) following a global consensus study published ...

item.title: Pete Buttigieg Endorses Josh Turek in Iowa Senate Democratic Primary
item.description: Pete Buttigieg, former U.S. Transportation Secretary and winner of the 2020 Iowa Democratic caucuses, has officially endorsed state Rep. Josh Turek in the Iowa Senate Democratic primary, opposing stat...

item.title: Saudi Ministry Introduces Digital Platform to Smoothen Hajj 2026 for Pakistani Pilgrims
item.description: The Saudi Ministry of Hajj and Umrah has introduced a major digital initiative, called the 'Electronic Track', to make preparations for Hajj 2026 more efficient and organised. This platform now provid...
